caption: A man with glasses and a patterned green traditional cap is shown in a close-up shot against a plain white background. He remains relatively still across the sequence, with subtle movements in his facial expression as he looks slightly to the right. Each frame features a news graphic overlay. In the upper left of every frame is the "plustv" logo. A purple bar across the middle contains the text "PLUS POLITICS," followed by a white bar with the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU" in bold black letters. The bottom banner changes over time: the first two frames display "WATCH ON" alongside logos for "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308," while the third frame shows "WATCH ONLINE" and the URL "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV," and the final frame displays "SUBSCRIBE" followed by "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE."
